Ammon
Detachment Card — Reverse
550 Points

A Ammon detachment consists of 1 Aerospace.

Upgrades

This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 5:

Increase the Detachment size by 1+550 points
Increase the Detachment size by 2+1100 points
Increase the Detachment size by 3+1650 points
Increase the Detachment size by 4+2200 points
